hibernate-mapping.sql-query: with src as ( select asg.*, (select person_number from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.person_id) as person_number, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.person_id) as person_name, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.billing_organisation_person_id) as billing_org_person_name, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.eu_contact_person_id) as eu_org_person_name, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.timecard_approval_id) as timesheet_approver_1_name, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.timecard_secondary_approval_id) as timesheet_approver_2_name, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.timecard_tertiary_approval_id) as timesheet_approver_3_name, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.expense_approver_1) as expense_approver_1_name, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.expense_approver_2) as expense_approver_2_name, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.expense_approver_3) as expense_approver_3_name, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.deliverables_approver_1) as deliverables_approver_1_name, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.deliverables_approver_2) as deliverables_approver_2_name, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.deliverables_approver_3) as deliverables_approver_3_name, (select organisation_name from hp_organisation_d where organisation_id = asg.billing_organisation_id) as billing_organisation_name, (select organisation_name from hp_organisation_d where organisation_id = asg.eu_organisation_id) as eu_organisation_name, (select meaning from sys_common_lookups where lookup_type = 'STATES' and lookup_code = asg.working_state) as working_state_meaning, to_char(asg.assignment_start_date, '${dateFormat}') as asg_start_date_format, to_char(asg.assignment_end_date, '${dateFormat}') as asg_end_date_format, (select name from hp_payment_methods where pay_method_id = asg.pay_method_id) as payment_method_name, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.created_by) as created_by_name, to_char(asg.creation_date, '${dateFormat}') as creation_date_format, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.last_updated_by) as last_updated_name, to_char(asg.last_update_date, '${dateFormat}') as last_update_date_format, rate.element_id as pref_asg_rate_element_id, rate.amount as pref_asg_rate_amount, rate.period as pref_asg_rate_period, (select meaning from sys_common_lookups where lookup_type = 'PAY_BASIS' and lookup_code = rate.period) as pref_asg_rate_period_meaning, rate.alternate_name as pref_asg_rate_alt_name, decode(asg.wc_org_code_rate_link_id, null, 'N', 'Y') as has_wc, (select decode(nvl(count(*), 0), null, 'N', 0, 'N', 'Y') from prt_assignment_setup where assignment_id = asg.assignment_id) as has_prt, inv.invoice_date as last_invoice_date, pay.date_earned as last_paid_date from hp_assignments_d asg, (select source_id as assignment_id, to_char(max(invoice_date), '${dateFormat}') as invoice_date from hp_invoice where source = 'ASSIGNMENT' group by source_id ) inv, (select assignment_id, to_char(max(date_earned), '${dateFormat}') as date_earned from hp_balance group by assignment_id ) pay, (select * from hp_assignment_rates where preferred = 'Y' ) rate where asg.assignment_id = inv.assignment_id(+) and asg.assignment_id = pay.assignment_id(+) and asg.assignment_id = rate.assigment_id(+) ) select * from src where 1 = 1 ${auto_fill} ${where_clause} ${order_by_clause}

select asg.*, (select person_number from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.person_id) as person_number, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.person_id) as person_name, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.billing_organisation_person_id) as billing_org_person_name, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.eu_contact_person_id) as eu_org_person_name, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.timecard_approval_id) as timesheet_approver_1_name, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.timecard_secondary_approval_id) as timesheet_approver_2_name, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.timecard_tertiary_approval_id) as timesheet_approver_3_name, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.expense_approver_1) as expense_approver_1_name, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.expense_approver_2) as expense_approver_2_name, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.expense_approver_3) as expense_approver_3_name, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.deliverables_approver_1) as deliverables_approver_1_name, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.deliverables_approver_2) as deliverables_approver_2_name, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.deliverables_approver_3) as deliverables_approver_3_name, (select organisation_name from hp_organisation_d where organisation_id = asg.billing_organisation_id) as billing_organisation_name, (select organisation_name from hp_organisation_d where organisation_id = asg.eu_organisation_id) as eu_organisation_name, (select meaning from sys_common_lookups where lookup_type = 'STATES' and lookup_code = asg.working_state) as working_state_meaning, to_char(asg.assignment_start_date, '${dateFormat}') as asg_start_date_format, to_char(asg.assignment_end_date, '${dateFormat}') as asg_end_date_format, (select name from hp_payment_methods where pay_method_id = asg.pay_method_id) as payment_method_name, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.created_by) as created_by_name, to_char(asg.creation_date, '${dateFormat}') as creation_date_format, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = asg.last_updated_by) as last_updated_name, to_char(asg.last_update_date, '${dateFormat}') as last_update_date_format from hp_assignments_d asg where asg.assignment_id = '${assignmentId}'
